title: Cary Elwes
content: Ivan Simon Cary Elwes (; born 26 October 1962) is an English actor and writer. He is best known for his leading film roles as Westley in "The Princess Bride" (1987), Robin Hood in ""(1993), and Dr. Lawrence Gordon in the "Saw" film series. He is also known for his performances in films like "Glory" (1989), "Hot Shots!"
